info.name: Movies App API
info.description:
# 🎬 Movies App API

This API allows you to manage movies, actors, directors, and genres.  
Built with Express.js and PostgreSQL, deployed on Render, and consumed by a React frontend hosted on Netlify.

## Base URL

`https://moviesapp-lc0z.onrender.com`

## Entities

- 🎭 Actors
    
- 🎬 Directors
    
- 🎞️ Movies
    
- 🏷️ Genres
    

## Authentication

No authentication required.

## CORS

CORS is currently open to all origins for educational and portfolio purposes. This configuration allows public access from any frontend during development and testing.

item.name: Actors

request.description:
### **Description:**

Retrieve all actors from database.

### **Correct Response:**

``` json
[
     {
        "birthday": "1988-11-06",
        "id": 1,
        "first_name": "Emma",
        "last_name": "Stone",
        "nationality": "American",
        "image": "https://tse4.mm.bing.net/th/id/OIP._QUirznXzIB9rGF73m69SQHaLI?rs=1&pid=ImgDetMain&o=7&rm=3",
        "createdAt": "2025-11-28T01:34:51.650Z",
        "updatedAt": "2025-11-28T01:34:51.650Z",
        "movies": [
            {
                "id": 1,
                "name": "Poor Things",
                "image": "https://resizing.flixster.com/t1AsBaA_GhqQDdLdMOswbCP0zF8=/206x305/v2/https://resizing.flixster.com/U_RT77J5o2EfMC-DdAc7Dm8CkKY=/ems.cHJkLWVtcy1hc3NldHMvbW92aWVzLzNmM2FiYmJhLTFjYTgtNDljOC04MjQ4LTU1Yjg0M2NkNTdmZC5qcGc=",
                "synopsis": "From filmmaker Yorgos Lanthimos and producer Emma Stone comes the incredible tale and fantastical evolution of Bella Baxter (Stone), a young woman brought back to life by the brilliant and unorthodox scientist Dr. Godwin Baxter (Willem Dafoe). Under Baxter's protection, Bella is eager to learn. Hungry for the worldliness she is lacking, Bella runs off with Duncan Wedderburn (Mark Ruffalo), a slick and debauched lawyer, on a whirlwind adventure across the continents. Free from the prejudices of her times, Bella grows steadfast in her purpose to stand for equality and liberation.",
                "release_year": 2023,
                "createdAt": "2025-11-28T01:47:27.050Z",
                "updatedAt": "2025-11-29T18:33:28.771Z",
                "actors_movies": {
                    "createdAt": "2025-11-28T01:47:27.957Z",
                    "updatedAt": "2025-11-28T01:47:27.957Z",
                    "actorId": 1,
                    "movieId": 1
                }
            }
        ]
    }
]

 ```

### Description:

Retrieve one actor by id from database.

### Correct Response:

``` json
{
    "birthday": "1994-10-23",
    "id": 8,
    "first_name": "Margaret ",
    "last_name": "Qualley",
    "nationality": "American",

    "updatedAt": "2025-11-28T01:44:34.240Z"
}

 ```

### **Description:**

Create a new actor into database.

### Correct Response:

``` json
{
    "birthday": "1996-09-01",
    "id": 34,
    "first_name": "Zendaya",
    "last_name": "Stoermer",
    "nationality": "American",
    "image": "https://tse1.explicit.bing.net/th/id/OIP.mOvc4m-2yQTNssMhdG6V0AHaLH?rs=1&pid=ImgDetMain&o=7&rm=3",
    "updatedAt": "2025-11-29T20:23:59.211Z",
    "createdAt": "2025-11-29T20:23:59.211Z"
}

### Description:

Update one actor by id from database.

### Correct Response:

``` json
{
    "birthday": "1994-10-23",
    "id": 8,
    "first_name": "Margaret ",
    "last_name": "Qualley",

### **Description:** Delete an actor into database by id. ### Correct Response:

item.description:
## 📘 Actors API Documentation

### 🧾 Overview

This collection manages **actor resources** in the Movies App API.  
It allows you to create, read, update, and delete actors, as well as retrieve detailed information for each one.

### 🌐 Base URL

Código

```
https://moviesapp-lc0z.onrender.com

 ```

### 📌 Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| GET | `/api/actors` | Get all actors |
| GET | `/api/actors/:id` | Get a single actor by ID |
| POST | `/api/actors` | Create a new actor |
| PUT | `/api/actors/:id` | Update an existing actor |
| DELETE | `/api/actors/:id` | Delete an actor |

### 🧩 Request Body (POST / PUT)

```
{
    "first_name": "Zendaya",
    "last_name": "Stoermer",
    "nationality": "American",  
    "image": "https://tse1.explicit.bing.net/th/id/OIP.mOvc4m-2yQTNssMhdG6V0AHaLH?rs=1&pid=ImgDetMain&o=7&rm=3",
    "birthday": "1996-09-01"
}

 ```

- `first_name` (string) – required
    
- `last_name` (string) – required
    
- `nationality` (string) – required
    
- `image` (text) – required
    
- `birthday` (dateonly) – required
    

### 🛡️ Authentication

No authentication required.  
CORS is currently open to all origins for educational and portfolio purposes. This configuration allows public access from any frontend during development and testing.

### 🧠 Notes

- All responses are in JSON format.
    
- Actor IDs are auto-generated.
    
- Nationality should be a valid country name or abbreviation.

item.name: Directors

Hungry for the worldliness she is lacking, Bella runs off with Duncan Wedderburn (Mark Ruffalo), a slick and debauched lawyer, on a whirlwind adventure across the continents. Free from the prejudices of her times, Bella grows steadfast in her purpose to stand for equality and liberation.",

item.description:
## 📘 Directors API Documentation

### 🧾 Overview

This collection manages **director resources** in the Movies App API.  
It allows you to create, read, update, and delete directors, as well as retrieve detailed information for each one.

### 🌐 Base URL

Código

```
https://moviesapp-lc0z.onrender.com

 ```

### 📌 Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| GET | `/api/directors` | Get all directors |
| GET | `/api/directors/:id` | Get a single director by ID |
| POST | `/api/directors` | Create a new director |
| PUT | `/api/directors/:id` | Update an existing director |
| DELETE | `/api/directors/:id` | Delete a director |

### 🧩 Request Body (POST / PUT)

json

```
{
    "first_name": "Christopher",
    "last_name": "Nolan",
    "nationality": "American and British",
    "image": "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Christopher_Nolan#/media/File:ChrisNolanBFI150224_(10_of_12)_(53532289710)_(cropped2).jpg",
    "birthday": "1970-07-30"
}

 ```

- `first_name` (string) – required
    
- `last_name` (string) – required
    
- `nationality` (string) – required
    
- `image` (text) – required
    
- `birthday` (dateonly) – required
    

### 🛡️ Authentication

No authentication required.  
CORS is currently open to all origins for educational and portfolio purposes. This configuration allows public access from any frontend during development and testing.

### 🧠 Notes

- All responses are in JSON format.
    
- Director IDs are auto-generated.
    
- Nationality should be a valid country name or abbreviation.

Under Baxter's protection, Bella is eager to learn. Hungry for the worldliness she is lacking, Bella runs off with Duncan Wedderburn (Mark Ruffalo), a slick and debauched lawyer, on a whirlwind adventure across the continents. Free from the prejudices of her times, Bella grows steadfast in her purpose to stand for equality and liberation.",

item.description:
## 📘 Genres API Documentation

### 🧾 Overview

This collection manages **genre resources** in the Movies App API.  
It allows you to create, read, update, and delete genres, as well as retrieve detailed information for each one.

### 🌐 Base URL

Código

```
https://moviesapp-lc0z.onrender.com

 ```

### 📌 Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| GET | `/api/genres` | Get all genres |
| GET | `/api/genres/:id` | Get a single genre by ID |
| POST | `/api/genres` | Create a new genre |
| PUT | `/api/genres/:id` | Update an existing genre |
| DELETE | `/api/genres/:id` | Delete a genre |

### 🧩 Request Body (POST / PUT)

json

```
{
  "name": "Drama"
}

 ```

- `name` (string) – required
    

### 🛡️ Authentication

No authentication required.  
CORS is currently open to all origins for educational and portfolio purposes. This configuration allows public access from any frontend during development and testing.  

### 🧠 Notes

- All responses are in JSON format.
    
- Genre IDs are auto-generated.
    
- Genre names should be unique and descriptive.

item.name: Movies

request.description:
### **Description:**

Retrieve all movies from database.

### **Correct Response:**

``` json
[
     {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "Poor Things",
        "image": "https://resizing.flixster.com/t1AsBaA_GhqQDdLdMOswbCP0zF8=/206x305/v2/https://resizing.flixster.com/U_RT77J5o2EfMC-DdAc7Dm8CkKY=/ems.cHJkLWVtcy1hc3NldHMvbW92aWVzLzNmM2FiYmJhLTFjYTgtNDljOC04MjQ4LTU1Yjg0M2NkNTdmZC5qcGc=",

Under Baxter's protection, Bella is eager to learn. Hungry for the worldliness she is lacking, Bella runs off with Duncan Wedderburn (Mark Ruffalo), a slick and debauched lawyer, on a whirlwind adventure across the continents. Free from the prejudices of her times, Bella grows steadfast in her purpose to stand for equality and liberation.",
        "release_year": 2023,

]

Under Baxter's protection, Bella is eager to learn. Hungry for the worldliness she is lacking, Bella runs off with Duncan Wedderburn (Mark Ruffalo), a slick and debauched lawyer, on a whirlwind adventure across the continents. Free from the prejudices of her times, Bella grows steadfast in her purpose to stand for equality and liberation.",
    "release_year": 2023,
    "createdAt": "2025-11-28T01:47:27.050Z",
    "updatedAt": "2025-11-29T18:33:28.771Z"
}

 ```

### **Description:**

Create one movie into database.

### **Correct Response:**

``` json
{
    "id": 5,
    "name": "Oppenheimer",
    "image": "https://resizing.flixster.com/5bbfOrn5Stku1HxlkK4ISYi2uQk=/206x305/v2/https://resizing.flixster.com/dV1vfa4w_dB4wzk7A_VzThWUWw8=/ems.cHJkLWVtcy1hc3NldHMvbW92aWVzLzEyZDMyYjZmLThmNzAtNDliNC1hMjFmLTA2ZWY4M2UyMjJhMi5qcGc=",
    "synopsis": "During World War II, Lt. Gen. Leslie Groves Jr. appoints physicist J. Robert Oppenheimer to work on the top-secret Manhattan Project. Oppenheimer and a team of scientists spend years developing and designing the atomic bomb. Their work comes to fruition on July 16, 1945, as they witness the world's first nuclear explosion, forever changing the course of history.",
    "release_year": 2023,
    "updatedAt": "2025-11-29T21:55:38.576Z",
    "createdAt": "2025-11-29T21:55:38.576Z"
}

 ```

Add actors by id actors to movie by id movie.

Under Baxter's protection, Bella is eager to learn. Hungry for the worldliness she is lacking, Bella runs off with Duncan Wedderburn (Mark Ruffalo), a slick and debauched lawyer, on a whirlwind adventure across the continents. Free from the prejudices of her times, Bella grows steadfast in her purpose to stand for equality and liberation.",

item.description:
## 📘 Movies API Documentation

### 🧾 Overview

This collection manages **movie resources** in the Movies App API.  
It allows you to create, read, update, and delete movies, as well as retrieve detailed information including actors, directors, and genres associated with each movie.

### 🌐 Base URL

Código

```
https://moviesapp-lc0z.onrender.com

 ```

### 📌 Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| GET | `/api/movies` | Get all movies |
| GET | `/api/movies/:id` | Get a single movie by ID |
| POST | `/api/movies` | Create a new movie |
| POST | `/api/movies/:id/genres` | Set genres to a movie |
| POST | `/api/movies/:id/actors` | Set actors to a movie |
| POST | `/api/movies/:id/directors` | Set directors to a movie |
| PUT | `/api/movies/:id` | Update an existing movie |
| DELETE | `/api/movies/:id` | Delete a movie |

### 🧩 Request Body (POST / PUT)

```
{
    "name": "Oppenheimer",
    "image": "https://resizing.flixster.com/5bbfOrn5Stku1HxlkK4ISYi2uQk=/206x305/v2/https://resizing.flixster.com/dV1vfa4w_dB4wzk7A_VzThWUWw8=/ems.cHJkLWVtcy1hc3NldHMvbW92aWVzLzEyZDMyYjZmLThmNzAtNDliNC1hMjFmLTA2ZWY4M2UyMjJhMi5qcGc=",
    "synopsis": "During World War II, Lt. Gen. Leslie Groves Jr. appoints physicist J. Robert Oppenheimer to work on the top-secret Manhattan Project. Oppenheimer and a team of scientists spend years developing and designing the atomic bomb. Their work comes to fruition on July 16, 1945, as they witness the world's first nuclear explosion, forever changing the course of history.",
    "release_year": 2023
}

 ```

- `name` (string) – required
    
- `image` (text) – required
    
- `synopsis` (text) – optional but recommended
    
- `release_year` (dateonly) – required
    

### 🛡️ Authentication

No authentication required.  
CORS is currently open to all origins for educational and portfolio purposes. This configuration allows public access from any frontend during development and testing.

### 🧠 Notes

- All responses are in JSON format.
    
- Movie IDs are auto-generated.
    
- Each movie must be linked to a valid director and genre.
    
- Actors can be associated via their IDs in the `actors` array.
    
- The `POST` endpoints with `/genres`, `/actors`, y `/directors` allows existing entities to be associated with a movie.
